author: codex-duplication-audit

patch.value: Deduplicate Claude and Codex plugin MCP wrappers and smoke flows

Duplicate audit 2026-05-22: jscpd found duplicated plugin wrapper and smoke logic across Claude and Codex plugin surfaces. scripts/smoke-claude-plugin.mjs:93-145 duplicates scripts/smoke-codex-plugin-mcp.mjs:16-68, and both scripts share the same callTool/spawn/server readiness shape again at smoke-claude-plugin.mjs:250-258 vs smoke-codex-plugin-mcp.mjs:120-128. The installed plugin entrypoints also duplicate wrappers: plugins/pm-claude/scripts/pm-mcp-server.mjs:10-28, 41-62 vs plugins/pm-codex/scripts/pm-mcp-server.mjs:2-20, 35-56. Existing pm-ash0 covers naming convergence and pm-0c9q covers native Codex plugin creation, but no active item tracks the shared smoke/wrapper implementation. Fix by extracting a reusable plugin MCP smoke harness and a shared wrapper template or generated entrypoint.

Claude and Codex smoke scripts share server startup, JSON-RPC callTool, readiness, and cleanup helpers; plugin pm-mcp-server wrappers are generated from or import one shared template; both plugin smoke commands still pass; pnpm build passes.

message: Create plugin smoke/wrapper duplication finding after duplicate-check search
